title: Orthochilus nuttii
taxonomy: Orthochilus nuttii belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family, which is the largest and most diverse group of flowering plants. This orchid species is further classified within the subfamily Vanilloideae and tribe Vanilleae. The genus Orthochilus is a group of orchids, some of which are native to Africa and Madagascar. The classification of Orthochilus nuttii helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological characteristics. Further research may be needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
